headline: Aptiv (APTV) Lands Robust.AI Deal For Gen 3 Carter Robot Sensors
summary: Aptiv (NYSE:APTV) is supplying its AI-powered PULSE sensor technology to Robust.AI’s Gen 3 Carter collaborative mobile robot. The integration focuses on 360-degree sensing, depth mapping, and safety features for autonomous operation. The partnership is commercially meaningful and extends Aptiv’s perception solutions into real-world robotics deployments. Aptiv, best known for its advanced vehicle and mobility systems, is pushing further into robotics through this partnership with Robust.AI...
